items.title: Officials are ‘Refusing’ to Release Bodycam Footage That May Show Cop Stealing Photographer’s Bag
items.summary: Officials have refused to hand over bodycam footage that may show a police officer cop stealing a photographer's bag, according to a new lawsuit. [Read More]

items.title: Plans to Stop People Pulling Over on Big Sur to Take Photos of Bixby Bridge
items.summary: Authorities in California are seeking to stop people from taking photos of Bixby Bridge on Big Sur by erecting no-parking signs near the famous spot. [Read More]

items.title: Woman Bravely Films Terrifying Encounter With Charging Grizzly Bear
items.summary: A video is going viral today after a woman filmed herself bravely standing up to a grizzly bear as it took a sinister interest in her dog. [Read More]

items.title: The Mighty Cut – New “Storytelling Sessions” Recording Now Available on MZed
items.summary: Have you ever felt a scene instantly transform by placing a cut within it? When do you decide to go for a series of rapid edits? And what about those moments where we choose to hold a shot instead of…
